data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ - All acceptance criteria met: (1) File-type routing section covers bash/Python/markdown with appropriate sub-criteria per type; (2) Project-specific checks in all 5 dimensions: correctness (fcntl.flock, hook exit codes), verification (.test-index, RED markers), hygiene (jq-free), maintainability (skill qualification), design (dispatcher architecture); (3) Unit test file created at tests/agents/test-reviewer-standard-checklist.sh (22 assertions, all green). No base guidance duplicated. 5 canonical dimension keys preserved.
